title: Caretaker stage C — contradiction resolution + ADR-007 finalisation
current_state: T-125a + T-125b handle recompute and dedup. Contradicting writes ('User lives in Atlanta' followed later by 'User lives in Multan') still coexist as independent active facts; recall pulls whichever ranks higher.
structural_problem: Without contradiction resolution, the latest fact about a thing is not authoritative; memory cannot be trusted as a source of current truth.
target_state: caretaker.full() gains contradiction scan: same category, conflicting NER-extractable values → keep newest, set invalid_at on older. ADR-007 finalised with all four states (stated, derived, superseded, invalidated). Deep mode (Haiku pattern review) added as nightly-only.
design_notes: Contradiction detection: per category, group by 'topic key' (rough heuristic: first 3 nouns); if multiple groups have conflicting numeric/place values, newest wins
Soft invalidation only: set invalid_at on losers; never delete
Deep mode (nightly): single Haiku call per major category reviews 'are these facts internally consistent? any contradictions or stale items?' — surfaces edge cases the heuristic missed
ADR-007 finalisation: states (stated/derived/superseded/invalidated), transitions, triggers, retention policy interaction (T-109)
success_criteria: Contradicting writes — older one gets invalid_at set
Deep mode Haiku call surfaces at least one real edge case in dev data
ADR-007 has all four lifecycle states documented
risk_notes: Heuristic risk: false-positive contradiction collapse. Mitigation: deep-mode Haiku review as a sanity check; dry-run on first deploy.
migration_plan: 4. Wire deep() into nightly cron only.
